name: safeclaw-prototype-productization-plan
decision: Treat the designer prototype as a product blueprint, not as sixteen separate production routes.
workspacePolicy: Do not modify the existing /workspace engine until shell routes and component extraction are ready.

phasePlan.name: Product IA Lock
phasePlan.goal: Convert /prototype from visual gallery to honest product blueprint.

phasePlan.name: Shell Routes Without Logic Migration
phasePlan.goal: Add route shells for missing modules while linking back to the working /workspace engine.

phasePlan.name: Component Extraction
phasePlan.goal: Extract document, evidence, worker, and dispatch panels into reusable components without changing behavior.

phasePlan.name: Missing Field Screens
phasePlan.goal: Build worker mobile and TBM fullscreen views from generated workpack state.

phasePlan.name: Operations Layer
phasePlan.goal: Complete archive search, API health, settings, and knowledge DB refresh workflows.

submissionGate: Prototype page explains live, partial, missing, and variant status honestly.
Missing modules have route-shell plans before component extraction starts.
Dispatch, exports, knowledge DB, and API orchestration retain smoke evidence.
